reason: Global TianChen-RV RVV-first authority chain, Stage2 boundary, and forbidden route-authority sources.
RVV plugin ownership, typed selected-body authority, compare/select/mask semantics, and selected-body realization boundaries.
Unified EmitC neutrality plus provider-owned route operand binding, mirrors, and target artifact validation contracts.
Focused MLIR/FileCheck/C++ and optional ssh rvv evidence requirements for RVV runtime correctness claims.

summary: Implement one bounded computed_mask_select route foundation: prove or repair selected tcrv.exec RVV variant -> typed/pre-realized tcrv_rvv compare-produced mask and select body -> RVV provider route facts -> TCRVEmitCLowerableRoute -> target artifact validation -> optional generated-bundle ssh rvv evidence.

Production computed_mask_select route support already existed across typed/pre-realized body, provider route-family plan, statement plan, target artifact validation, and generated-bundle script. Implemented focused evidence closure in test/Target/RVV/pre-realized-selected-body-artifact-computed-mask-select.mlir by adding stale target-artifact mirror checks for predicate, runtime ABI order, route operand binding plan/summary, provider mirror, target leaf profile, mask role/source/form, and select layout.

production_path_result: No production source route change was needed; existing provider/materializer/harness path was sufficient after focused proof gaps were closed.
